endpoints.name: GET /people/{userId}
endpoints.description: Get a person's profile. If your app uses scope https://www.googleapis.com/auth/plus.login, this method is guaranteed to return ageRange and language.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: GET /people/{userId}/people/{collection}
endpoints.description: List all of the people in the specified collection.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{COLLECTION}} with a real collection. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.
